name: PostV1CryptoDepositAddresses
description: Generate Crypto Deposit Address (USDT/USDC) via Ashar Management (transparent CaaS proxy)

api_key.description: Ashar Management API key (Bearer token) — user is resolved automatically from this key

chain.description: Blockchain network for the deposit (lowercase). EVM chains use Notus ERC-4337; Solana/Tron/Stellar use BlindPay.

requestBody.description: Generates a custody address for receiving USDT or USDC. The user is automatically resolved from the API key — no need to pass user_id. WARNING: Send ONLY the specified asset on the specified network.
